data_description.account_name: Ett vänligt namn för detta AWS-konto
data_description.refresh_interval_minutes: Hur ofta AWS API:er ska pollas (5-60 minuter)
data_description.create_individual_count_sensors: Aktiverar historikdiagram för resursräkningar (använder fler sensorer)

regions.title: Välj AWS-regioner
regions.description: Välj vilka regioner som ska övervakas

services.title: Select Services to Monitor
services.description: Choose which AWS services to monitor. Only enable services you actually use. The next step will show the minimum IAM policy needed for your selection.

iam_policy.title: IAM Policy
iam_policy.description:
Apply this minimum IAM policy to your AWS user before clicking Finish.

```json
{policy}
```

Policy covers {service_count} service(s).

error.connection: Kan inte ansluta till AWS. Kontrollera din internetanslutning.

data_description.refresh_interval: Hur ofta AWS ska kontrolleras för resursuppdateringar (1-60 minuter)
data_description.cost_refresh_interval: Hur ofta AWS Cost Explorer ska kontrolleras (60-1440 minuter). Kostnadsdata uppdateras en gång dagligen, att kontrollera oftare slösar pengar ($0,01 per API-anrop).
data_description.create_individual_count_sensors: Skapa separata räkningssensorer för varje resurstyp (EC2, RDS, Lambda, etc.)
data_description.skip_initial_refresh: Vänta inte på data vid uppstart - hämta vid första schemalagda uppdatering

select_services.title: Select Services to Monitor
select_services.description: Choose which AWS services to monitor. Removing a service will delete its sensors. Adding a service may require updating your IAM policy.

iam_additions.title: IAM Policy Update Required
iam_additions.description:
You have added services that require new IAM permissions. Add the following actions to your IAM policy before saving:

```
{actions}
```

refresh_account.name: Uppdatera konto
refresh_account.description: Uppdatera manuellt all AWS-data för ett konto
